data.name: Vtuber Sex Manager
data.detailed_description:
At last, you have the means to create the world’s first Porn VTuber agency.

With three girls willing to do anything, your job as manager is to train them, guide them, and fuck them while they stream live for thousands of viewers. Each one is unique:

🐱 Airi / NekoNami – Energetic, chaotic, playful. A cat eager to lick your cock live.

🩸 Rika / Velmira – Dominant milf, a succubus who craves to dominate her audience in every way possible.

👓 Ayaka / MeguHoshi – Pretends to be shy, but is unstable and dependent. Loses her nerd act the moment your cock takes over.

As their fame grows, so do the problems: jealousy, pride, fatal mistakes on stream and fans willing to cross all limits.

Will you lead your agency to success… or will fame destroy them?

FEATURES

  • Finally: animations! Some girls feature a special animated scene.

  • Visual Novel++ Format: Each heroine has her own arcs that complete her story.

  • Uncensored!: We’ve removed image censorship (an optional toggle will be added later).

  • Gallery: Fill your album with images as you progress, and replay finished chapters anytime.

  • Choose Your Path: Make decisions that change the course of the story.

  • Flashback: Jump back at any moment to change a choice or relive a scene.

  • Comfortable Navigation: Auto-play text or skip it to jump straight to your favorite parts.

  • Immersive Audio: Includes music, sound effects, voices, and “other effects.” Adjust each volume independently or mute everything.

PLEASE NOTE

  • All characters depicted and visually represented in this game are over 18 years old, and no real or identifiable minors were used in the production of this game.

  • Help us out! If you think you can improve the narrative in your language, feel free to send us your suggestions via email or message us on our Steam page.

data.short_description: You’re the manager of a Porn VTuber agency. Train them, fuck them, and make the streams more real than ever. Make them famous and see how far they’ll go to be the best.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 韓文, 日文, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 Compatible Graphics Card
  • 儲存空間: 2048 MB 可用空間
